# TextWiz

> TextWiz is a native macOS productivity app that runs AI writing shortcuts on text you select—via clipboard + global hotkey (⌘⇧Space) or macOS Services—without Accessibility APIs. Free on-device Apple Foundation Model (Apple Intelligence) on supported Macs, plus nine providers (Gemini, OpenAI, Claude, Mistral, Groq, OpenRouter, Ollama, LM Studio, MLX-LM), custom shortcuts, inline diff, and local history. Marketing site: https://textwiz.luongnv.com — source: https://github.com/luongnv89/textwiz

## Product

- [Home](https://textwiz.luongnv.com/): Overview, features, demo video, FAQ
- [Getting started](https://textwiz.luongnv.com/getting-started): Ollama and cloud API setup, hotkey, Services menu, troubleshooting
- [API keys guide](https://textwiz.luongnv.com/api-keys): Free-tier Gemini, Groq, OpenRouter, Mistral, Ollama signup and Keychain setup

## Updates & policy

- [Changelog](https://textwiz.luongnv.com/changelog): Release notes
- [Privacy policy](https://textwiz.luongnv.com/privacy): Static site, Keychain, local SQLite, third-party AI providers
- [Terms of service](https://textwiz.luongnv.com/terms): Website and app terms

## Optional

- [Full context for AI](https://textwiz.luongnv.com/llms-full.txt): Extended product, setup, FAQ, and privacy text
